name: ASRock B650M-HDV/M.2 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x1 - M.2 Key-E for WiFi - Support DDR5-6400+(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Dragon 2.5G LAN
shortName: ASRock B650M-HDV/M.2 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x PCIe 4.0
description: Micro-ATX motherboard for AMD AM5 with DDR5, dual PCIe 4.0 x16, and budget-friendly option for value-conscious builders.
